problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
